action.content: Write a funny song-style poem for kids about why you shouldn't eat a lot of sweets. The poem should have four sections, with each section marked with SECTION X.
action.label: context

action.content:
SECTION 1
I like to eat a little candy,
But not too much, you see.
My tummy feels a bit tight,
And I can't feel very nice.
I've got a little tummy ache,
And I'm not feeling very well.
So I'll stop right there and say,
"Please don't eat too much!"

SECTION 2
The sweets make my teeth hurt,
And my mouth feels a bit dry.
I can't chew properly,
And I can't speak properly.
My tongue is all swollen up,
And I can't taste anything.
So I'll stop right there and say,
"Please don't eat too much!"

SECTION 3
My friends are eating ice cream,
And they're having a great time.
But I'm not eating any,
And I'm not feeling very nice.
I've got a little tummy ache,
And I'm not feeling very well.
So I'll stop right there and say,
"Please don't eat too much!"

SECTION 4
The doctor said I shouldn't,
And he said I shouldn't eat.
He said sweets make me sick,
And he said I shouldn't eat.
So I'll stop right there and say,
"Please don't eat too much!"
I'll eat a little snack,
But not too much, you see.
My tummy feels a bit tight,
And I can't feel very nice.
So I'll stop right there and say,
"Please don't eat too much!"
action.label: response
